name: checked
description: Boolean checked state. Use `bind:checked` for two-way control. Mutually exclusive with `group`.

name: group
description: Array membership mode. Use `bind:group` with a shared array; `value` is the membership token.

name: value
description: The value this checkbox contributes to `group`. Required when `group` is bound.

name: indeterminate
description: Third-state visual; renders a minus glyph instead of the check.

name: lineThrough
description: Strike through the label when checked.

name: labelPosition
description: Label placement relative to the box.

name: iconChecked
description: Custom glyph rendered when checked (replaces the default check).

name: onchange
description: Fired on native change. The second arg is the next checked state.
